misc: Making a comeback after a few years' hiatus from Hector Trophée events by returning to Konopiště and competing in Hector Trophée 2026.
Did participate in the 2025 Matchplay series.
biography: Kristian, a familiar face from Master Golf Club, is set to make a return to the prestigious Hector Trophée at Konopiště in 2026 after a hiatus of a few years. Known for his thoughtful approach to the game, Kristian's return marks his fourth appearance at the event.

While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Kristian's participation in the 2025 Matchplay series demonstrates his continued commitment to competitive golf. Spectators and fellow competitors alike anticipate his performance, eager to witness the blend of experience and renewed vigor that Kristian brings to the course.
